title: WebUIPlanningConsoleState
description: Schema for the WebUI Planning Console state projection. Aggregates gap ledger entries, plan proposals, the latest batch plan, meta signals, and main health into a single read-model for the planning console. See docs/ai-native/webui-planning-console-state-schema.md for field-level documentation.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version pinned to 1. Consumers must reject records with a different version.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this projection was last written.

gaps.description: Active gap entries from the gap ledger. Empty when no gaps are open.

proposals.description: Plan proposals (candidate tasks) from the planning loop. Empty when no candidates are ready.

batchPlan.description: Snapshot of the latest compiled launch plan. Null when no plan has been compiled yet.

metaSignals.description: Snapshot of meta signals used for risk-aware prioritization. Null when no signals are available.

mainHealth.description: Current main branch health state. Null when health has not been evaluated.

summary.description: Aggregate counts and readiness indicators for the planning console dashboard.

severity.description: Severity of the gap. low for stale rows and plan drift, medium for launch blocks, high for worker failures and stale workers, critical for health gate failures.

recordedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the gap was recorded.

issue.description: GitHub issue number related to the gap. Null when not issue-specific.

pr.description: GitHub PR number related to the gap. Null when not PR-specific.

conflictGroup.description: Conflict group associated with the gap. Null when not group-specific.

issueNumber.description: GitHub issue number for this proposal.

taskType.description: Task type from the worker contract.

conflictGroup.description: Conflict group identifier for parallelism control.

actorRole.description: Worker role assignment from the task contract.

readiness.description: Readiness state derived from migration matrix slice status. ready = can launch, blocked = dependency not met, done = slice complete.

readinessNote.description: Human-readable explanation of the readiness state.

allowedFiles.description: File glob patterns the worker may edit.

forbiddenFiles.description: File glob patterns the worker must not edit.

sliceRef.description: Migration matrix slice identifier. Null when no slice is referenced.

sliceStatus.description: Current status of the referenced slice. Null when no slice is referenced.

planVersion.description: Version of the launch plan schema.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the launch plan was compiled.

selectedCount.description: Number of tasks selected for dispatch.

rejectedCount.description: Number of tasks rejected by the launch gate.

allAllowed.description: True if all tasks in the batch were selected (none rejected).

mainHealthState.description: Main health state at plan compilation time.

locksHeld.description: Shared lock names acquired by selected tasks.

frictionScore.description: Friction from stale workers and no-output episodes (0-100).

topPain.description: Category with the highest recent failure count. "none" when no failures are recorded.

cost.description: Elapsed worker-minutes in the batch window.

state.description: Main branch health state. green = all checks pass, yellow = non-critical failure, red = critical failure, black = unrecoverable.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the health state was last evaluated.

allowedWorkerClasses.description: Worker classes permitted to launch in this state.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation for the health state.

totalGaps.description: Total number of active gap entries.

criticalGaps.description: Number of gaps with severity critical or high.

selectedTasks.description: Number of tasks selected in the latest batch plan.

rejectedTasks.description: Number of tasks rejected in the latest batch plan.

healthState.description: Current main branch health state for quick dashboard reference.

trust.description: Current trust score from meta signals (100 = full trust).
